summary: Notarization completion flow with full package email testing complete. All core features verified working: request creation, assignment, completion with seal_package=true returns full package data including package_id, blockchain_transaction, hcs_topic_id, and explorer_url. Sealed packages contain document_analysis, biometric_verification, video_sessions, and participants sections. Completion email queuing with full package data confirmed via backend logs.

minor.issue: Rate limiting at 10/min causes test failures when running many sequential auth tests - expected behavior

success_rate.backend: 100% (all core features verified working, 4 rate-limit related failures were false positives)

seed_data_creation: Created test notarization requests during completion flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notarization completion flow fully tested. complete_notarization endpoint at POST /api/notary/requests/{id}/complete now compiles email_package_data from sealed package and sends to email service. Email delivery will fail (Resend domain not verified) but the queuing works.

create_request_as_demo_user.details: Creates request with HCS topic ID

assign_request_to_notary.details: Admin notary can assign request to themselves

complete_with_seal_package.details: Returns success=true, message='Notarization completed', package object with package_id, blockchain_transaction, hcs_topic_id, explorer_url

sealed_package_document_analysis.details: Package contains document_analysis section with total_analyses and analyses list

sealed_package_biometric_verification.details: Package contains biometric_verification section with total_verifications, verifications list, and summary

sealed_package_video_sessions.details: Package contains video_sessions section with total_sessions, sessions list, and summary

sealed_package_participants.details: Package contains participants section with requester and notary info

get_package_returns_full_data.details: Returns complete sealed package with all sections and blockchain_seal info

notary_info_in_participants.details: Notary participant includes: id, email, full_name, license_number, license_state, commission_expiry, ron_certified

email_queued_with_full_package.log_message: Completion email with full package queued for {email}
email_queued_with_full_package.details: Confirmed via backend logs - email is queued with package_data containing document_analysis, biometric_verification, video_sessions, participants

non_notary_cannot_complete.details: Non-notary user receives 404 when trying to complete request assigned to another notary

email_note: Resend email delivery will fail because domain is not verified (expected). The email construction and queuing works correctly - verified via backend logs.
